title: Split domus task and idea commands into multiple files
summary: task.ts and idea.ts are single large files with all subcommand logic inline. Refactor each into a directory (e.g. commands/task/ and commands/idea/) with one file per subcommand plus a shared helpers file.
outcome_note: Superseded by refactor: extract shared helpers from idea and task commands (commit 2061f22). Files are now lean enough that per-subcommand splitting adds navigation overhead with no readability gain.

title: Fix domus CLI access in Claude Code Bash tool
summary: The Bash tool runs with a stripped PATH that excludes ~/.bun/bin, so 'domus' is not found. Options: add ~/.bun/bin to the tool's PATH via shell init, use DOMUS=/Users/kion/.bun/bin/domus alias in CLAUDE.md, or document the full path workaround.
outcome_note: Symlinked ~/.bun/bin/bun and ~/.bun/bin/domus into /opt/homebrew/bin — both are now on PATH in Bash tool sessions

title: Fix task status updates to go through domus CLI
summary: Skills and Claude currently update task status by editing markdown files directly, bypassing domus task status and leaving tasks.jsonl out of sync. Fix by ensuring domus task status works correctly and updating skill instructions to shell out to the CLI.

title: domus task status should update both tasks.jsonl and task markdown frontmatter
summary: When domus task status runs, it updates tasks.jsonl but leaves the Status field in the task's markdown detail file stale. It should update both atomically so the md file stays in sync without Claude needing to touch it.

title: Add domus task/idea show command and --json flag on list
summary: Add --json flag to task/idea list for machine-readable bulk output, and a show subcommand for human-readable single-entry detail. Eliminates the need to read .md or .jsonl files directly.

title: Write unit tests for domus CLI
summary: Add a bun test suite covering the core logic in task.ts and idea.ts: JSONL read/write, ID generation, status transitions, flag parsing, frontmatter sync. Run against temp directories to avoid polluting real .domus/ state.

title: Add domus task/idea update command for editing metadata fields
summary: No CLI command exists for updating fields like title, summary, tags, or priority after creation. Direct edits to .jsonl bypass the CLI and break the contract that index files are never touched directly.

title: Fix worker isProcessRunning receives worktreePath instead of pid
summary: pollWorker passes worktreePath (a string) to isProcessRunning which expects a pid. parseInt on a path is NaN so process.kill(NaN, 0) throws, marking every running worker failed immediately. Fix: add pid to WorkerStatus, persist in dispatchWorker, pass correctly.
outcome_note: Worker dispatch feature not in use yet

title: Fix worktreeHasNewCommits hardcodes master as base branch
summary: git log master..HEAD silently fails on main-based repos, causing all completed workers to be classified as failed even when commits were made. Base branch should come from project git config or be passed as context.
outcome_note: Worker dispatch feature not in use yet

title: Rework domus init to handle current workspace structure and be idempotent
summary: Rework domus init for the project-local model: creates missing .domus/ subdirs and seed files, merges .claude/settings.json (permissions + PATH), reports what was created vs skipped, never destructive. Removes global config model.

title: Fix temp directory leak in tickets.test.ts on test failure
summary: parseTicket and updateTicketStatus test blocks use Date.now() for unique dirs with inline cleanup. If an assertion fails before cleanup, the directory leaks. Use beforeEach/afterEach or try/finally for guaranteed cleanup.

title: domus commands walk up to find .domus directory
summary: Non-init domus commands should traverse parent directories to find the nearest .domus/ dir, like git finds .git. Currently resolveWorkspace() reads from global config. Replace with upward traversal from cwd so domus works from any subdirectory of a project.

title: Migrate domus-specific ideas and tasks from everycent to domus
summary: Domus work has been flowing through everycent for dev experience reasons. Once domus is stable enough to self-host, move all domus-specific ideas, tasks, and memory content back to the domus project context.

title: Add --root flag to domus commands to target a specific project
summary: domus commands resolve to cwd/.domus/, making it impossible to target a different project without cd-ing first. Add a --root <path> flag (or env var) so commands like task add and idea add can write to a specified project root — needed while building domus from within the everycent project context.

title: Get domus ready for prod / new machine setup
summary: Update README with: how domus works, installation steps (bun dependency, PATH setup), required CLAUDE.md entries, skills to install. Consider whether to package as a Claude Code plugin or document as manual steps. Include a warning blurb: this is a learning project to understand working with and building around agents — not intended as a long-term tool, likely to be abandoned when learnings are exhausted and a maintained replacement exists.

title: Add priority field to domus task/idea list output
summary: The human-readable list output shows icon, refinement, id, and title but omits priority. Adding priority to the list line makes it visible at a glance without needing --json, since it directly affects what to work on next.

title: Add domus CLI and store permissions to domus init
summary: domus commands (via domus or bun) and .domus/ file access should never trigger permission prompts in Claude Code. domus init should write the correct permissions into .claude/settings.json so any project can apply them by running domus init.

title: Add --depends-on flag to domus task update
summary: task update supports title, summary, tags, priority, refinement but not depends_on. Adding --depends-on allows dependencies to be set or changed after creation without direct file edits.

title: Add Edit and Write tool permissions to domus init
summary: Background agents need Edit and Write permissions pre-authorized in settings.json to avoid pulling focus back to the foreground. domus init should include these alongside the existing Bash/Read/Glob/Grep entries.
outcome_note: Already implemented — Edit and Write were already in REQUIRED_PERMISSIONS in src/commands/init.ts.

title: Fix resolveDomusPermission to work with bun linked binaries
summary: bun link sets process.argv[1] to the .ts source file even for installed binaries, so the .ts suffix check causes resolveDomusPermission to return null. Need a different detection strategy — e.g. resolve the binary from PATH, or use an env var set by the CLI wrapper.

title: Fix --help exiting with code 1 instead of 0
summary: All --help invocations (e.g. domus task add --help) print usage correctly but exit with code 1. Should exit 0 so callers (shell scripts, Claude tools) don't treat it as a failure.

title: Add --depends-on flag to task update command
summary: The task update CLI command is missing --depends-on support. Only task add has it. This means dependencies can't be set on existing tasks via CLI, forcing direct file edits.

title: Add --depends-on support to domus task update
summary: domus task update has no --depends-on flag, so dependency relationships can't be set after task creation. Should support: domus task update <id> --depends-on <id1,id2> and ideally domus task update <id> --add-depends-on <id> / --remove-depends-on <id> for incremental edits.
outcome_note: Duplicate of add-depends-on-flag-to-domus-task-update which is already autonomous

title: Add execution log command for autonomous task progress
summary: Add a CLI command for agents to append timestamped progress entries to a task's execution log. Log lives separately from the task body — separate file, domus owns writes, Claude reads to resume. Convention: in-progress or stalled tasks have a log at .domus/logs/<id>.md. Exact command shape, log format, and cold-agent orientation convention TBD in refinement.

title: Add stalled task status for human-in-the-loop escalation
summary: Add a 'stalled' status to the task lifecycle for tasks that are in-progress but blocked waiting for human input. Agent marks task stalled with context (what was tried, what's needed), human sees it, answers, agent resumes. Distinct from cancelled/deferred — it's a temporary pause expecting a response. Details of the escalation UX and status transitions TBD in refinement.

title: Add pipeline observability command
summary: Add a CLI command (domus task pipeline or similar) that shows the live execution view: what's running, what's stalled with context, what's queued by dependency order. The data foundation is execution logs + task status. Complements domus task list (which is the full inventory) by focusing on active state. Exact output format and filtering TBD in refinement.

title: Update domus CLAUDE.md with vision and pillar framing
summary: The vision articulated in the 2026-03-15 session belongs in domus CLAUDE.md so every session starts with it as context. Core: remove human from execution path without removing them from decision path. Four pillars: interactive session support, concept refinement engine, auto execution engine, observability platform. Context mobility as the substrate beneath all four. Also update domus-vision.md in memory to reflect this framing.
